_comment: Coverage ratchet baseline. CI fails if any metric below this drops on a PR. Refresh by running `node tools/check-coverage-baseline.mjs --update` after intentionally adjusting tests.

crap._comment: CRAP = ccn² × (1 − cov)² + ccn, per file. max + p95 are the ratcheted aggregates; high_risk is the count of files with CRAP > 30 (informational, not a hard gate).
